title: hieracium amphipolium
intro: Hieracium amphipolium, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium amphipolium include its ability to reduce fever, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Hieracium amphipolium include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
